# ~~parseToolCallText()~~

> **Test Support Layer**

```ts
function parseToolCallText(payload: unknown): string | undefined;
```

Defined in: [src/app/testing/utility/mcp-response.utility.ts:107](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/testing/utility/mcp-response.utility.ts#L107)

Extracts the text content from a `tools/call` JSON-RPC response.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type      | Description                        |
| --------- | --------- | ---------------------------------- |
| `payload` | `unknown` | The raw JSON-RPC response payload. |

## Returns

`string` | `undefined`

The first text string, or `undefined` if absent.

## Deprecated

No longer imported by any test.  Service-level
`executeFormatted` assertions replaced raw JSON-RPC inspection.

## Remarks

Navigates `payload.result.content` and delegates to
[getTextContent](getTextContent.md) for the final text extraction.
